data.name: Alone With my StepSister
data.detailed_description:
Alone With My Step-Sister is an 18+ sandbox visual novel where every room in your empty house is a playground for teasing, chores, and steadily hotter dares.
Your parents are gone for two weeks; you and your razor-tongued, 21-year-old step-sister are left to “keep things tidy.” Between breakfast dishes and late-night movies, the tension climbs from playful shoves to bedroom invitations – all driven by a single Lewd Level that tracks how bold she’s willing to get.

Master the daily sandbox loop – Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Night – deciding where to go and what to do:

  • Chores & Money: wash dishes, fold laundry, fix the Wi-Fi and earn allowance for gifts.

  • Random Events: walk in on her stretching, showering, napping on the couch – react or peek and accept the consequences.

  • Risk-&-Reward Choices: push too hard and trust drops; play it smooth and her Lewd Level rises from 0 (hands off) to 5 (anything goes).

  • Level-Up Quests: four milestone scenes—cook-together mishap, wine-fueled dares, movie-night lap ride, bedroom phone confession—each unlocking new actions and positions.

  • Free-Roam H-Scenes: once she hits Lv 5, choose from 10 unique positions (missionary, standing shower, spooning, cowgirl, etc.) plus special endings for every random encounter.

  • Gallery & Achievements: replay every CG, listen to every moan, and hunt Steam achievements for perfection.

Fast banter, branching reactions, and a dynamic suspicion meter keep every visit fresh: keep things quiet or risk a “how’s it going?” call from Mom that locks you out of fun for a day.

Can you juggle chores, keep the house from imploding, and still coax your step-sister into the wildest vacation of her life?
Find out when the parents leave—and nothing’s off-limits but the neighbors’ ears.

data.short_description: A playful, 18+ sandbox visual novel: manage chores, flirt, and raise your step-sister’s Lewd Level from teasing to full service—unlocking branching H-scenes, random events, and a spicy gallery as you risk, charm, and seduce your way through two weeks home alone.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS 3.5 / Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended
